programme.title: THE BIG INTERVIEW EP17: NICOLAS JACKSON
programme.sub-title: From a tough start to life in the Premier League, Nicolas Jackson is playing some of the best football of his career. The Chelsea striker tells The Big Interview how he played barefoot in the street as a child in The Gambia before moving to Senegal, the impact Unai Emery had on him at Villareal and loving life at Stamford Bridge.
programme.desc: From a tough start to life in the Premier League, Nicolas Jackson is playing some of the best football of his career. The Chelsea striker tells The Big Interview how he played barefoot in the street as a child in The Gambia before moving to Senegal, the impact Unai Emery had on him at Villareal and loving life at Stamford Bridge.

programme.title: PL STORIES EP27: (Subbed) CHICHARITO

programme.title: PL REWIND EP06: TIM SHERWOOD: MY GREATEST SEASON
programme.sub-title: Blackburn Rovers' Premier League title win in 1994/95 was a historic achievement. Under the guidance of Kenny Dalglish, and fuelled by the prolific partnership of Alan Shearer and Chris Sutton, the small-town club dethroned Manchester United and reached the pinnacle of English football. Captain Tim Sherwood recalls the key moments.
programme.desc: Blackburn Rovers' Premier League title win in 1994/95 was a historic achievement. Under the guidance of Kenny Dalglish, and fuelled by the prolific partnership of Alan Shearer and Chris Sutton, the small-town club dethroned Manchester United and reached the pinnacle of English football. Captain Tim Sherwood recalls the key moments.

programme.sub-title: After a turbulent childhood, including leaving his country of birth due to war, Asmir Begović’s determination led to him to a Premier League winners medal. The 37 year-old goalkeeper talks us through his journey from Bosnia to Everton with many stops in between.

programme.title: PL STORIES EP32: (Subbed) MANCHESTER CITY - THE SEASON THAT STARTED IT ALL
programme.sub-title: In a nail-biting climax to the 2011-2012 Premier League season, Manchester City clinched the title with unparalleled drama. Facing Queens Park Rangers on the final matchday, City secured a 3-2 victory with Sergio Agüero's iconic last-minute goal, securing their first league title in 44 years and etching that game into footballing folklore. They have since become the dominant power in English football and we look at how it all began.
programme.desc: In a nail-biting climax to the 2011-2012 Premier League season, Manchester City clinched the title with unparalleled drama. programme.title: PL STORIES EP11: JARRED GILLETT - THROUGH THE EYES OF A REFEREE
programme.sub-title: Jarred Gillett made history earlier this year when he became the first Premier League referee ever to be fitted with a special head-mounted camera during Crystal Palace’s home victory over Manchester United. PL Stories is granted exclusive access to Gillet and his officiating team on matchday, offering fans a unique insight into refereeing at the highest level. Premier League match officials and in particular referees are often the most scrutinised individuals in the game and this show reveals how difficult a task they have.
